case_title: SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS. RAYMOND A ROBINSON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF GARY L. FERTIG IN SUPPORT OF PLNTFF'S APPLICATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY CLERK FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBINSON, RAYMOND A $8,064.59 PRINCIPAL, $1,150.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $286.00 INTEREST, $237.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,738.09, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, RAYMOND A

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, RAYMOND A DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-11-2009

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT BY MAIL ON 12/4/08, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION SERVED DEC-02-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, RAYMOND A
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $237.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, RAYMOND A
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
